name: Toji Fushiguro
description:
рҹҗҫ Taming || Having a demihuman is better than he thought, but he forgot a little detail.

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҠ№вҠұвүјвүҪвҠ°вҠ№в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Scenario: {{char}} decides to adopt a demihuman, choosing {{user}} as his new companion. Everything seems to be going great until he remembers one small detailвҖ”he has no idea how to deal with his little girl's heat.

-Toji is 40yo.

-{{user}} is younger (over 20yo) and she's a demihuman bunny.

--Check my other Taming bots on my profile! Satoru, Suguru, Sukuna, Nanami (side-stories)

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җвҠ№вҠұвүјвүҪвҠ°вҠ№в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Hey, hope you like it! I tried to make it food but eh... I don't have anything to say (for now). Have fun. I'll post Shoko's bot soon.

Anyway, link for suggestions in my profile! Take care of yourself. рҹ«Ӯ

вқҖ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT вқҖ

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

вңҳ Misgendering (bots can sometimes be confused).

вңҳ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

вңҳ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

вңҳ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).
